text:
23 PRs merged today. The big news: gptimage-large and FLUX.1 Kontext are now completely free. We dropped the paywall so you can generate heavier pixels without thinking about credits.

We also welcomed a massive wave of 20 new community apps to the ecosystem—everything from AI wallpapers to Isekai character generators. The garden is growing fast. 🌱

Finally, if DeepSeek or Kimi were dropping connections for you lately, we fixed it. Rolled back the routing, ate the bugs, connections are stable again.

See what people are building at pollinations.ai/apps

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #aiartcommunity #generativeai #webdev
